MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Ira N. Katz, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF IRAN. KATZ (310) 248-4400 ATTORNEY FOR Defendant Max's Wholesale Import and Export, Inc.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MAX'S WHOLESALE IMPORT AND EXPORT, INC. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Ira Katz's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order using the mandatory Judicial Counsel Form MC-053.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
